title: 🧠 APPLICABLE INTELLECTUAL STACK — PAST, PRESENT, FUTURE
content:
🧠 APPLICABLE INTELLECTUAL STACK — PAST, PRESENT, FUTURE
Each resource below is mapped to:
• 🕰️ TEMPORAL MODE: Past (foundation), Present (execution), Future (expansion)
• 🎯 USE IN SYSTEM: What part of your OS it feeds (e.g., recursion engine, naming system, symbolic wave functions)
• 🧰 WORKFLOW MODE: Experimental | Production | Archival | Business-facing
I. 📘 Foundational Recursion & Symbolic Logic
🧱 Books + Resources
Title
Temporal Mode
Use in System
Why It Matters
SICP (Structure & Interpretation of Computer Programs)🕰️ Past–Present
Recursion engine, symbolic metaphors
Teaches language as system; builds recursive cognitive models for code and myth alike
Paradigms of AI Programming (Norvig)🕰️ Past–Future
AI modules, symbolic AI
Directly informs building generative, symbolic language systems (e.g., character engines, hybrid AI myths)
Nature of Code (Shiffman)🕰️ Present
Procedural animation + generative systems (visual/audio)
You’re literally building wave engines and symbolic fusions — this teaches motion-as-metaphor through code
context: From document: Grokking Algorithms for OS — chunk 275 (chunk 275/402)
